case_title: MALHOTRA, ASHOK vs. SEXTON, PETER et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALHOTRA, ASHOK AS TO DEFENDANT SEXTON, PETER DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-02-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-03-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-14-1997
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-02-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE FOR POS. HEARING SET FOR JUN-11-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-11-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE UM ORDER. OSC ON PLTF'S ATTY KENNETH B. TISHGART. HEARING SET FOR AUG-20-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-20-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-20-1997, TO FILE POS OR UM ORDER. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY KENNETH B TISHGART., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-04-1997 CONTINUED FROM AUG-20-1997 TO OCT-01-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-01-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS OR PROOF OF PUBLICATION AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY KENNETH B TISHGART. HEARING SET FOR DEC-17-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-17-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC IS TO WHY PROOF OF SERVICE OR PROOF OF SERVICE BY PUBLICATION HAS NOT BEEN FILED OR WHY ANSWER NOT OBTAINED OR DEFAULT ENTERED AGAINST DEFENDANT. OSC AND SANCTION TO PLTF'S ATTY KENNETH B TISHGART, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE A NEW STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT 20 DAYS BEFORE HRG., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-02-1998 CONTINUED FROM DEC-17-1997 TO MAR-11-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-11-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-11-1998, WHY SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT. PLTF'S TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING. OSC AND SANCTIONS TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY KENNETH B TISHGART, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-26-1998 CONTINUED FROM MAR-11-1998 TO APR-22-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-22-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-22-1998, TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY KENNETH B TISHGART, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-07-1998 CONTINUED FROM APR-22-1998 TO MAY-27-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-27-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $999.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAY-27-1998, TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT TO PAY ALL SANCTIONS OSC AND SANCTIONS TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY KENNETH B TISHGART, WHO IS REQURIED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-10-1998 CONTINUED FROM MAY-27-1998 TO JUL-22-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALHOTRA, ASHOK

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-22-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO PAY ALL SANCTIONS IMPOSED. TO FILE UM DESIGNATION. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY KENNETH B TISHGART. HEARING SET FOR AUG-19-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-19-1998, OFF CALENDAR DISMISSED ON 8-12-98.
